_schema: SystemOverview — project description with repository inventory
name: DreamGraph
description: DreamGraph is an autonomous cognitive layer for software systems. It builds and maintains a living knowledge graph of features, workflows, data models, architecture decisions, UI semantics, and cognitive insights. It supports grounded code understanding, disciplined modification workflows, speculative dream cycles, threat scanning, API surface extraction, and interactive tooling through both MCP/server interfaces and a VS Code extension.

repositories.name: dreamgraph
repositories.role: Primary application repository containing the DreamGraph server, cognitive engine, tooling surface, resource registry, discipline workflow system, and supporting utilities.
primary_workflows: discipline-based audit → plan → execute → verify sessions
living documentation and UI semantic registration

repositories.name: extensions/vscode
repositories.role: VS Code extension that acts as DreamGraph’s interactive self-interface for chat, context construction, dashboard visibility, and operational health feedback.
primary_workflows: user prompt → context assembly → DreamGraph request → response rendering
tool and context transparency for interactive sessions
